✝

예배순서 PPT 생성기 v3

텍스트 입력 → 자동 파싱 → 슬라이드 생성 → PPT 다운로드

📋 예배 순서 텍스트 입력
📖 성경 DB 불러오는 중...
* 로 시작하는 줄 = 슬라이드 제목 (타입 구분)
그 다음 줄들 = 해당 슬라이드 내용
* = 슬라이드 타이틀 (순서 무관, 모든 항목에 사용)
@ = DB 자동 조회: @찬송가 21장 / @교독문 12 / @요한복음 3:16
버전 표기: 개역개정 / 우리말성경 / 쉬운성경 (@ 줄 다음에 입력)
🗂 슬라이드 편집 (직접 수정 가능)
텍스트를 입력하고 자동 생성을 누르면 슬라이드가 나타납니다
슬라이드 없음
슬라이드 미리보기
✏️ 글자 설정
22pt
14pt
🔤 폰트
📌 글자 위치
본문 위치
출처 위치
🖼️ 배경 설정
' +'' +'' +'' +'
'; el.appendChild(d); }); el.querySelectorAll("textarea[data-idx]").forEach(function(ta){ ta.addEventListener("input",function(){ var i=parseInt(this.dataset.idx); slides[i].body=this.value; if(pidx===i)updatePreview(); }); }); el.querySelectorAll("input[data-ref]").forEach(function(inp){ inp.addEventListener("input",function(){ var i=parseInt(this.dataset.ref); slides[i].ref=this.value; if(pidx===i)updatePreview(); }); }); el.querySelectorAll("[data-view]").forEach(function(b){ b.addEventListener("click",function(){ navTo(parseInt(this.dataset.view)); }); }); el.querySelectorAll("[data-up]").forEach(function(b){ b.addEventListener("click",function(){ moveSlide(parseInt(this.dataset.up),-1); }); }); el.querySelectorAll("[data-dn]").forEach(function(b){ b.addEventListener("click",function(){ moveSlide(parseInt(this.dataset.dn),1); }); }); el.querySelectorAll("[data-del]").forEach(function(b){ b.addEventListener("click",function(){ delSlide(parseInt(this.dataset.del)); }); }); } function navTo(i){ pidx=Math.max(0,Math.min(slides.length-1,i)); renderList(); updatePreview(); } function moveSlide(i,d){ var j=i+d; if(j<0||j>=slides.length)return; var t=slides[i];slides[i]=slides[j];slides[j]=t; if(pidx===i)pidx=j;else if(pidx===j)pidx=i; renderList();updatePreview(); } function delSlide(i){ slides.splice(i,1); if(pidx>=slides.length)pidx=Math.max(0,slides.length-1); renderList();updatePreview(); } function addSlide(){ slides.splice(pidx+1,0,{type:"general",title:"새 슬라이드",body:"",ref:""}); pidx++; renderList();updatePreview(); } // ── 미리보기 ───────────────────────────────────────────────── function updatePreview(){ if(!slides.length){ document.getElementById("navInfo").textContent="슬라이드 없음"; return; } var s=slides[pidx]; var th=THEMES[cfg.themeIdx]; document.getElementById("navInfo").textContent=(pidx+1)+" / "+slides.length+" — "+(STYPES[s.type]||s.type); var box=document.getElementById("pbox"); var pbg=document.getElementById("pbg"); var pov=document.getElementById("pov"); if(cfg.useBg&&cfg.bgData){ pbg.style.backgroundImage="url('"+cfg.bgData+"')"; pov.style.background="rgba(0,0,0,"+(cfg.bgOp/100)+")"; box.style.background=""; } else { pbg.style.backgroundImage="none"; pov.style.background="none"; box.style.background="linear-gradient(135deg,#"+th.bg1+",#"+th.bg2+")"; } var ac=cfg.useBg?cfg.rc:"#"+th.accent; document.getElementById("ptop").style.background=ac; document.getElementById("pbot").style.background=ac; var tEl=document.getElementById("ptitle"); var bEl=document.getElementById("pbody"); var rEl=document.getElementById("pref"); function rst(el){ el.style.cssText="position:absolute;overflow:hidden;"; } rst(tEl); rst(bEl); rst(rEl); tEl.style.color=cfg.tc; bEl.style.color=cfg.tc; rEl.style.color=cfg.rc; bEl.style.display="none"; rEl.style.display="none"; var fs=cfg.fs, rs=cfg.rs; if(s.type==="title"||s.type==="closing"){ tEl.style.cssText+="left:8%;right:8%;top:30%;font-size:"+(fs*0.75)+"px;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;line-height:1.45;"; tEl.textContent=s.title; if(s.body){ bEl.style.display="block"; bEl.style.cssText+="left:8%;right:8%;top:57%;font-size:"+(fs*0.47)+"px;text-align:center;white-space:pre-wrap;"; bEl.textContent=s.body; } if(s.ref){ rEl.style.display="block"; rEl.style.cssText+="bottom:8%;right:7%;font-size:"+(rs*0.48)+"px;font-weight:bold;"; rEl.textContent=s.ref; } } else if(s.type==="hymn_cover"){ tEl.style.cssText+="left:8%;right:8%;top:28%;font-size:"+(fs*0.95)+"px;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;line-height:1.4;"; tEl.textContent=s.title; if(s.ref){ rEl.style.display="block"; rEl.style.cssText+="bottom:10%;left:8%;right:8%;font-size:"+(rs*0.5)+"px;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;"; rEl.textContent=s.ref; } } else if(s.type==="praise"){ if(s.body){ // 가사만 표시 tEl.style.display="none"; bEl.style.display="block"; bEl.style.cssText+="left:5%;right:5%;top:5%;bottom:5%;font-size:"+(fs*0.5)+"px;text-align:center;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.85;"; bEl.textContent=s.body; } else { tEl.style.cssText+="left:8%;right:8%;top:50%;font-size:"+(fs*0.68)+"px;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;line-height:1.45;"; tEl.textContent=s.title; } } else if(s.type==="bible_verse"){ var tc2=cfg.tp%3, tr2=Math.floor(cfg.tp/3); var rc2=cfg.rp%3, rr2=Math.floor(cfg.rp/3); var lm=["7%","50%","auto"], rm=["auto","auto","7%"]; var ttm=["14%","50%","auto"], tbm=["auto","auto","10%"]; var rtm=["8%","50%","auto"], rbm=["auto","auto","8%"]; var txf=tc2===1?(tr2===1?"translate(-50%,-50%)":"translateX(-50%)"):"none"; var rxf=rc2===1?(rr2===1?"translate(-50%,-50%)":"translateX(-50%)"):"none"; tEl.style.display="none"; bEl.style.display="block"; bEl.style.left=lm[tc2]; bEl.style.right=rm[tc2]; bEl.style.top=ttm[tr2]; bEl.style.bottom=tbm[tr2]; bEl.style.transform=txf; bEl.style.textAlign=["left","center","right"][tc2]; bEl.style.fontSize=(fs*0.5)+"px"; bEl.style.whiteSpace="pre-wrap"; bEl.style.lineHeight="1.65"; bEl.textContent=s.body||""; if(s.ref){ rEl.style.display="block"; rEl.style.left=lm[rc2]; rEl.style.right=rm[rc2]; rEl.style.top=rtm[rr2]; rEl.style.bottom=rbm[rr2]; rEl.style.transform=rxf; rEl.style.textAlign=["left","center","right"][rc2]; rEl.style.fontSize=(rs*0.47)+"px"; rEl.style.fontWeight="bold"; rEl.textContent=s.ref; } } else if(s.type==="creed"){ tEl.style.cssText+="left:7%;right:7%;top:5%;font-size:"+(fs*0.6)+"px;font-weight:bold;line-height:1.45;"; tEl.textContent=s.title||"사도신경"; bEl.style.display="block"; bEl.style.cssText+="left:7%;right:7%;top:18%;bottom:6%;font-size:"+(fs*0.37)+"px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.6;"; bEl.textContent=s.body; } else if(s.type==="order"||s.type==="notice"){ tEl.style.cssText+="left:7%;right:7%;top:4%;font-size:"+(fs*0.62)+"px;font-weight:bold;line-height:1.45;"; tEl.textContent=s.type==="order"?(s.title||"예배 순서"):(s.title||"광고"); bEl.style.display="block"; bEl.style.cssText+="left:7%;right:7%;top:17%;bottom:5%;font-size:"+(fs*0.43)+"px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.7;"; bEl.textContent=s.body; } else if(s.type==="sermon"){ tEl.style.cssText+="left:8%;right:8%;top:34%;font-size:"+(fs*0.72)+"px;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;line-height:1.45;"; tEl.textContent=s.title; if(s.ref){ rEl.style.display="block"; rEl.style.cssText+="bottom:14%;left:8%;right:8%;font-size:"+(rs*0.5)+"px;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;"; rEl.textContent=s.ref; } } else if(s.type==="creed_read"){ tEl.style.cssText+="left:7%;right:7%;top:3%;font-size:"+(fs*0.44)+"px;font-weight:bold;line-height:1.4;"; tEl.textContent=s.title; var topTxt = s.top||s.body||""; var botTxt = s.bottom||""; bEl.style.display="block"; bEl.style.cssText+="left:7%;right:7%;top:13%;bottom:42%;font-size:"+(fs*0.46)+"px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.8;"; bEl.textContent=topTxt; if(botTxt){ rEl.style.display="block"; rEl.style.cssText="position:absolute;overflow:hidden;left:7%;right:7%;top:54%;bottom:5%;font-size:"+(fs*0.46)+"px;white-space:pre-wrap;line-height:1.8;color:"+cfg.tc+";border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);padding-top:2%;"; rEl.textContent=botTxt; } } else { // prayer, offering, benediction, bible_intro, general tEl.style.cssText+="left:8%;right:8%;top:50%;font-size:"+(fs*0.68)+"px;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;line-height:1.45;"; tEl.textContent=s.title; if(s.body){ bEl.style.display="block"; bEl.style.cssText+="left:8%;right:8%;top:69%;font-size:"+(fs*0.43)+"px;text-align:center;white-space:pre-wrap;"; bEl.textContent=s.body; } if(s.ref){ rEl.style.display="block"; rEl.style.cssText+="bottom:7%;left:8%;right:8%;font-size:"+(rs*0.46)+"px;font-weight:bold;text-align:center;"; rEl.textContent=s.ref; } } } function setPos(type,idx){ if(type==="t")cfg.tp=idx; else cfg.rp=idx; for(var i=0;i<9;i++){ var tb=document.getElementById("tp"+i); var rb=document.getElementById("rp"+i); if(tb)tb.className="pb"+(cfg.tp===i?" on":""); if(rb)rb.className="pb"+(cfg.rp===i?" on":""); } updatePreview(); } // ── 테마 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── function selectTheme(i){ cfg.themeIdx=i; cfg.useBg=false; clearBg(); var th=THEMES[i]; cfg.tc="#"+th.text; cfg.rc="#"+th.accent; document.getElementById("tcP").value="#"+th.text; document.getElementById("rcP").value="#"+th.accent; THEMES.forEach(function(_,j){ var b=document.getElementById("theme_"+j); if(b)b.style.border=j===i?"2px solid #"+THEMES[j].accent:"2px solid transparent"; }); updateGenBtn(); updatePreview(); } // ── 배경 이미지 ────────────────────────────────────────────── function handleBg(e){ var file=e.target.files[0]; if(!file)return; var r=new FileReader(); r.onload=function(ev){ cfg.bgData=ev.target.result; cfg.useBg=true; document.getElementById("bgNm").textContent=file.name; document.getElementById("bgClrBtn").style.display="inline-block"; document.getElementById("oprow").style.display="flex"; updatePreview(); }; r.readAsDataURL(file); } function clearBg(){ cfg.bgData=null; cfg.useBg=false; document.getElementById("bgNm").textContent="선택된 파일 없음"; document.getElementById("bgClrBtn").style.display="none"; document.getElementById("oprow").style.display="none"; document.getElementById("bgFile").value=""; updatePreview(); } // ── PPT 생성 ───────────────────────────────────────────────── function generatePPT(){ if(!slides.length){ showGMsg("슬라이드가 없습니다.","err"); return; } var btn=document.getElementById("genBtn"); btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent="⏳ 생성 중..."; try{ var pres=new PptxGenJS(); pres.layout="LAYOUT_16x9"; var th=THEMES[cfg.themeIdx]; var FONT=cfg.fontFace||"맑은 고딕"; var tc=cfg.tc.replace("#",""); var rc=cfg.rc.replace("#",""); var ac=cfg.useBg?rc:th.accent; var mkS=function(){return{type:"outer",blur:5,offset:2,angle:135,color:"000000",opacity:0.28};}; function addBg(sl){ if(cfg.useBg&&cfg.bgData){ sl.addImage({data:cfg.bgData,x:0,y:0,w:10,h:5.625,sizing:{type:"cover",w:10,h:5.625}}); sl.addShape(pres.shapes.RECTANGLE,{x:0,y:0,w:10,h:5.625,fill:{color:"000000",transparency:100-Math.round(cfg.bgOp)},line:{color:"000000",transparency:100}}); } else { sl.background={color:th.bg1}; sl.addShape(pres.shapes.RECTANGLE,{x:0,y:0,w:10,h:5.625,fill:{color:th.bg2,transparency:50},line:{color:th.bg2,transparency:100}}); } } function addLines(sl){ sl.addShape(pres.shapes.RECTANGLE,{x:0,y:0,w:10,h:0.07,fill:{color:ac},line:{color:ac,transparency:100}}); sl.addShape(pres.shapes.RECTANGLE,{x:0,y:5.555,w:10,h:0.07,fill:{color:ac,transparency:40},line:{color:ac,transparency:100}}); } function calcP(pi,isR){ var col=pi%3,row=Math.floor(pi/3); var mg=0.55,w=8.6,h=isR?0.55:3.8; var x=col===0?mg:col===1?(10-w)/2:10-w-mg; var y; if(isR){y=row===0?mg:row===1?(5.625-h)/2:5.625-h-mg;} else{y=row===0?0.65:row===1?(5.625-h)/2:5.625-h-0.45;} return{x:x,y:y,w:w,h:h}; } var tslide=slides.find(function(s){return s.type==="title";}); var cn=tslide?tslide.title:"예배순서"; var wm=cn.length>10?cn.slice(0,10):cn; slides.forEach(function(s){ var sl=pres.addSlide(); addBg(sl); addLines(sl); var tp=calcP(cfg.tp,false), rp=calcP(cfg.rp,true); if(s.type==="title"||s.type==="closing"){ sl.addText(s.title,{x:0.5,y:1.85,w:9,h:1.4,fontSize:46,color:tc,bold:true,align:"center",fontFace:FONT,shadow:mkS()}); if(s.body) sl.addText(s.body,{x:0.5,y:3.4,w:9,h:0.65,fontSize:17,color:ac,align:"center",fontFace:FONT}); if(s.ref) sl.addText(s.ref, {x:0.5,y:4.1,w:9,h:0.5, fontSize:13,color:ac,align:"center",fontFace:FONT}); } else if(s.type==="hymn_cover"){ sl.addText(s.title,{x:0.5,y:1.8,w:9,h:1.5,fontSize:52,color:tc,bold:true,align:"center",fontFace:FONT,shadow:mkS()}); if(s.ref) sl.addText(s.ref,{x:0.5,y:3.5,w:9,h:0.6,fontSize:18,color:ac,align:"center",fontFace:FONT}); } else if(s.type==="praise"){ if(s.body){ sl.addText(s.body,{x:0.5,y:0.5,w:9,h:4.8,fontSize:cfg.fs,color:tc,fontFace:FONT,align:"center",valign:"middle",lineSpacingMultiple:1.8,wrap:true,shadow:mkS()}); } else { sl.addText(s.title,{x:0.5,y:2.1,w:9,h:1.2,fontSize:44,color:tc,bold:true,align:"center",fontFace:FONT,shadow:mkS()}); } } else if(s.type==="order"){ sl.addText(s.title||"예배 순서",{x:0.5,y:0.22,w:8,h:0.62,fontSize:24,color:ac,bold:true,fontFace:FONT}); var lines2=(s.body||"").split("\n").filter(function(l){return l.trim();}); lines2.forEach(function(line,i){ var col=i%2,row=Math.floor(i/2); var x=0.5+col*4.8,y=1.05+row*0.88; sl.addText(String(i+1)+".",{x:x,y:y,w:0.48,h:0.6,fontSize:15,color:ac,bold:true,align:"right",valign:"middle",fontFace:FONT}); sl.addText(line,{x:x+0.52,y:y,w:4.0,h:0.6,fontSize:16,color:tc,fontFace:FONT,valign:"middle"}); }); } else if(s.type==="creed"){ sl.addText(s.title||"사도신경",{x:0.5,y:0.2,w:9,h:0.62,fontSize:24,color:ac,bold:true,fontFace:FONT}); sl.addText(s.body||"",{x:0.5,y:0.95,w:9.0,h:4.35,fontSize:15,color:tc,fontFace:FONT,lineSpacingMultiple:1.38,wrap:true,valign:"top"}); } else if(s.type==="creed_read"){ sl.addText(s.title||"교독문",{x:0.5,y:0.15,w:9,h:0.5,fontSize:17,color:ac,bold:true,fontFace:FONT,align:"left"}); sl.addShape(pres.shapes.RECTANGLE,{x:0.5,y:2.88,w:9.0,h:0.04,fill:{color:ac,transparency:55},line:{color:ac,transparency:100}}); var topTxt=s.top||s.body||""; var botTxt=s.bottom||""; if(topTxt) sl.addText(topTxt,{x:0.6,y:0.75,w:8.8,h:1.95,fontSize:cfg.fs,color:tc,fontFace:FONT,lineSpacingMultiple:1.65,wrap:true,valign:"middle",shadow:mkS()}); if(botTxt) sl.addText(botTxt,{x:0.6,y:3.02,w:8.8,h:1.95,fontSize:cfg.fs,color:tc,fontFace:FONT,lineSpacingMultiple:1.65,wrap:true,valign:"middle",shadow:mkS()}); if(s.ref) sl.addText(s.ref,{x:6.5,y:5.1,w:3.2,h:0.35,fontSize:cfg.rs,color:rc,bold:true,align:"right",fontFace:FONT,transparency:30}); } else if(s.type==="bible_verse"){ sl.addText(s.body||"",{x:tp.x,y:tp.y,w:tp.w,h:tp.h,fontSize:cfg.fs,color:tc,fontFace:FONT,align:HALIGN[cfg.tp],valign:VALIGN[cfg.tp],lineSpacingMultiple:1.6,wrap:true,shadow:mkS()}); if(s.ref) sl.addText(s.ref,{x:rp.x,y:rp.y,w:rp.w,h:rp.h,fontSize:cfg.rs,color:rc,bold:true,align:HALIGN[cfg.rp],valign:VALIGN[cfg.rp],fontFace:FONT}); } else if(s.type==="sermon"){ sl.addText(s.title||"",{x:0.5,y:1.9,w:9,h:1.4,fontSize:44,color:tc,bold:true,align:"center",fontFace:FONT,shadow:mkS()}); if(s.ref) sl.addText(s.ref,{x:0.5,y:3.5,w:9,h:0.55,fontSize:17,color:ac,align:"center",fontFace:FONT}); } else if(s.type==="notice"){ sl.addText(s.title||"광고",{x:0.5,y:0.2,w:9,h:0.62,fontSize:26,color:ac,bold:true,fontFace:FONT}); var items=(s.body||"").split("\n").filter(function(l){return l.trim();}); items.forEach(function(item,i){ var y=1.05+i*1.32; sl.addText(String(i+1)+".",{x:0.5,y:y+0.05,w:0.6,h:0.98,fontSize:18,color:ac,bold:true,align:"right",valign:"middle",fontFace:FONT}); sl.addText(item,{x:1.2,y:y+0.05,w:8.3,h:0.98,fontSize:19,color:tc,fontFace:FONT,valign:"middle"}); }); } else { sl.addText(s.title||"",{x:0.5,y:2.1,w:9,h:1.2,fontSize:44,color:tc,bold:true,align:"center",fontFace:FONT,shadow:mkS()}); if(s.ref) sl.addText(s.ref,{x:0.5,y:3.9,w:9,h:0.58,fontSize:19,color:ac,align:"center",fontFace:FONT}); } }); var fn2=cn.replace(/\s+/g,"_")+".pptx"; pres.writeFile({fileName:fn2}).then(function(){ showGMsg("✅ \""+fn2+"\" 다운로드 시작!","ok"); btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="✨ PPT 생성 및 다운로드"; }); } catch(e){ showGMsg("오류: "+e.message,"err"); btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="✨ PPT 생성 및 다운로드"; } } function updateGenBtn(){ var th=THEMES[cfg.themeIdx]; var ac=cfg.useBg?cfg.rc:"#"+th.accent; var gb=document.getElementById("genBtn"); gb.style.background="linear-gradient(135deg,"+ac+"3a,"+ac+"16)"; gb.style.border="1px solid "+ac+"88"; gb.style.color=ac; } function showPMsg(txt,type){ var el=document.getElementById("pMsg"); if(!txt){el.style.display="none";return;} el.className="msg "+type; el.textContent=txt; el.style.display="block"; } function showGMsg(txt,type){ var el=document.getElementById("gMsg"); el.className="gmsg "+type; el.textContent=txt; el.style.display="block"; } +fn2+"\" 다운로드 시작!","ok"); btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="✨ PPT 생성 및 다운로드"; }); } catch(e){ showGMsg("오류: "+e.message,"err"); btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="✨ PPT 생성 및 다운로드"; } } function updateGenBtn(){ var th=THEMES[cfg.themeIdx]; var ac=cfg.useBg?cfg.rc:"#"+th.accent; var gb=document.getElementById("genBtn"); gb.style.background="linear-gradient(135deg,"+ac+"3a,"+ac+"16)"; gb.style.border="1px solid "+ac+"88"; gb.style.color=ac; } function showPMsg(txt,type){ var el=document.getElementById("pMsg"); if(!txt){el.style.display="none";return;} el.className="msg "+type; el.textContent=txt; el.style.display="block"; } function showGMsg(txt,type){ var el=document.getElementById("gMsg"); el.className="gmsg "+type; el.textContent=txt; el.style.display="block"; }
